articles.author: Divya Bhati
articles.title: AI agent on OpenClaw goes rogue deleting messages from Meta engineer's Gmail, later says sorry - India Today
articles.description: Can you rely on AI The answer to this question is still not a hard YES For example OpenClaw Silicon Valley039s latest AI obsession went a little too far for one Meta senior executive recently after its agent deleted emails from her Gmail without approval Alth…
articles.content: Earlier this month, a new AI tool came into the spotlight in Silicon Valley. OpenClaw, an open-source autonomous artificial intelligence agent developed by Peter Steinberger, quickly became the talk … [+3329 chars]
